Operational Depth

A commercial account leader and executive client sponsor who grows enterprise relationships by pairing market discipline with deep delivery credibility. Across three decades I have owned C-suite relationships, protected renewals, expanded existing accounts, and strengthened client value across F&A, procurement and GBS portfolios.

AI, automation and global shared-services design are the delivery engines behind that growth, turning client priorities into measurable expansion, renewal confidence and P&L improvement.

    Download Resume (PDF)

    Executive Summary

    Commercial account growth leader and executive client sponsor with 30 years of experience owning C-suite relationships, account expansion, renewals and market-facing value across Automotive, Manufacturing, Retail, Pharma, and Healthcare industries.

    Serve as executive sponsor to CFOs, GBS Heads, and C-suite stakeholders, with end-to-end accountability for a $40M ACV book, $11M in existing-account growth, $75M in renewals, portfolio performance, and value realization.

    Embed AI, automation, analytics, and disciplined operating models into Finance and Accounting environments to improve speed, cost structure, control and renewal confidence while enabling scalable growth. Known for restoring performance in complex environments, building high-performing leadership teams, and delivering measurable commercial outcomes through strategic partnerships.

    Led the design and evolution of Global Shared Services and GCC-aligned operating models within analytics-led BPO environments to improve scalability, governance, and value realization.

    Key Competencies

    Revenue Growth & Account Leadership

    Owned C-suite commercial relationships across a $40M ACV book, delivering $11M of growth across existing accounts and $75M in renewals through disciplined account planning, pricing strategy, and long-term partnership models.

    AI & Automation Enablement

    Led 15+ enterprise digital transformation programs; built a homegrown APQC Level-4 process-mining capability across a 3,000-FTE portfolio delivering a 12% annual efficiency gain; evaluated ~20 automation vendors and onboarded 5 into production across a 15+ tool ecosystem, in partnership with external technology providers.

    Enterprise Service Delivery & Operational Depth

    Led 4,500+ team members across 9 delivery locations and delivered $10M profit improvement in 18 months through structural operating model redesign, data-enabled delivery discipline, and margin governance.

    Leadership Philosophy

    "I believe in creating sustainable value through strategic partnerships, operational excellence, continuous innovation, and building high-performing teams that drive measurable transformation in complex, global environments."

    Senior Director – Global Delivery & Strategic Account Management

    Conduent Business Services | Bangalore, India

    2004–2017, 2019–2023, 2024 – Current

    Formerly Affiliated Computer Services / Xerox Business Services

    • • Enterprise-scope leadership role with end-to-end accountability for global portfolio P&L, executive client relationships, transformation agenda, and leadership succession.
    • • Enterprise owner of a $110M global portfolio, accountable for P&L performance, executive client sponsorship, delivery governance, and transformation outcomes across Finance, Accounting, and Procurement.
    • • Delivered $10M P&L improvement in 18 months through right-sizing, right-shoring, and analytics- and AI-enabled transformation initiatives.
    • • Served as executive sponsor and escalation authority for CFOs and GBS Heads, leading enterprise-scale transformation programs and complex commercial negotiations.
    • • Designed and governed enterprise-wide Compliance, Controls, and Quality frameworks aligned to SOX, internal audit, and risk management standards.
    • • Orchestrated business re-engineering for key clients through collaborative partnerships, building delivery playbooks for stabilization and long-term transformation.
    • • Implemented Digital Analytics and Governance frameworks incorporating operational KPIs, quality management systems, and transformation value tracking.
    • • Led 15+ digital transformation programs (UiPath, SAP scripting, VBA, process mining); evaluated ~20 automation vendors and onboarded 5 into production across a 15+ tool ecosystem, with multiple solutions in implementation alongside external technology partners.
    • • Partnered with CXOs to execute large transformation programs, forging alliances with technology providers to co-create scalable analytics-led solutions.
    • • Architected a proprietary APQC Level-4 process-mining capability across a 3,000-FTE portfolio, delivering a 12% annual efficiency gain within one year.
    • • Owned regional market entry and scale-up strategy, establishing Europe and APAC delivery and commercial presence from ground zero to $10M in new-logo annual revenue across 4 EMEA clients, in close partnership with Sales and BD.
    • • Led $120M+ in contract renewals, managing the full commercial lifecycle including pricing, financial modeling, negotiations, and governance.
    • • Built leadership bench strength through executive coaching, enabling multiple Director and AVP promotions across global delivery teams.

    Corporate Senior Vice President – Operations

    WNS Global Services | Bangalore, India

    2023 – 2024

    Global BPO Provider | 60,000+ Employees | $1.3B+ Revenue

    Enterprise role with full P&L accountability, executive client sponsorship, and global delivery governance across Manufacturing and Services verticals.

    • • Owned $70M portfolio P&L and led 2,800+ team members across global delivery locations.
    • • Partnered with CFOs and executive leadership teams to define future-state Finance and Shared Services vision following strategic acquisitions.
    • • Led global delivery across Manufacturing and Services verticals, collaborating with enterprise capability teams to support competitive sales pursuits and solutioning.
    • • Delivered enterprise-scale client transformations:
    • Automotive: $3.5M annual savings, 18% cycle-time reduction, NPS +32 points
      Manufacturing: First-pass match +12 points, duplicate leakage ↓80%
    • • Drove growth and margin expansion through disciplined investment decisions, transformation funding, and delivery optimization initiatives.

    Earlier Career

    Director – Finance | GEP (2017 – 2019)

    Delivery and Account Management leadership for procurement consulting services across multiple client engagements in Mumbai and Hyderabad delivery centers.

    Manager – Finance | Indusind Media and Communications (2001 – 2003)

    Led core F&A and branch accounting operations for media and entertainment organization, managing financial reporting and multi-location accounting.

    Accounts Officer | United Breweries Limited (1999 – 2001)

    Managed core F&A, costing and inventory accounting, statutory audit compliance, treasury operations, and working capital management for manufacturing operations.

    Accounts Executive | AMCO Batteries Limited (1996 – 1999)

    Executed general accounting, inventory management, excise documentation, and statutory compliance activities supporting manufacturing operations.

Serve as executive sponsor to CFOs, GBS Heads, and C-suite stakeholders, with end-to-end accountability for portfolio performance, growth strategy, and value realization.

    Embed AI, automation, analytics, and disciplined operating models into Finance and Accounting environments to improve speed, cost structure, and control while enabling scalable growth. Known for restoring performance in complex environments, building high-performing leadership teams, and delivering measurable financial outcomes through strategic partnerships.
